user.title: Ubisys PoC
user.description: Set up the Ubisys PoC integration. Sensors will be created for all Ubisys devices already managed by ZHA.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only one instance is allowed.

device_not_found.message: Device not found. Make sure the device ID is correct.

not_a_zha_device.message: The selected device is not managed by ZHA.

zha_not_available.message: ZHA integration is not available. Make sure ZHA is set up and running.

no_setup_cluster.message: The selected device does not expose a ubisys setup cluster. Make sure it is a supported ubisys device.

no_input_configurations.message: This device does not have input configurations.

no_output_configurations.message: This device does not have output configurations.
